title: pauridia pusilla
intro: Pauridia pusilla, also known as the yellow grass or yellow veld iris, is a small, bulbous plant that belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Pauridia pusilla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
